commission_recipient.description: Address to receive the commission fees

curve_type.description:
enum to store the curve parameters used for this contract
if you want to add a custom Curve, you should make a new contract that imports this one.
write a custom `instantiate`, and then dispatch `your::execute` -> `cw20_bonding::do_execute`
with your custom curve as a parameter (and same with `query` -> `do_query`)

decimals.description:
number of decimal places of the supply token, needed for proper curve math.
If it is eg. BTC, where a balance of 10^8 means 1 BTC, then use 8 here.

symbol.description: symbol / ticker of the supply token

validators.description: list of validators to delegeate to

constant.description: Constant always returns `value * 10^-scale` as spot price

linear.description: Linear returns `slope * 10^-scale * supply` as spot price

square_root.description: SquareRoot returns `slope * 10^-scale * supply^0.5` as spot price

definitions.name: cosmwasm_std_math_uint128_Uint128
cosmwasm_std_math_decimal_Decimal
definitions.description:
A fixed-point decimal value with 18 fractional digits, i.e. Decimal(1_000_000_000_000_000_000) == 1.0

The greatest possible value that can be represented is 340282366920938463463.374607431768211455 = (2^128 - 1) / 10^18
